originalTitle: How I got into Berghain, Berlin’s notoriously selective club
summary: The mystique of its intimidating door policy still convinces people to fly in from all around the world
content: The mystique of its intimidating door policy still convinces people to fly in from all around the world

chineseSummary: 其令人生畏的大门政策的神秘性仍然说服人们从世界各地飞来
